files.name: 2026-06-27-scriptiniciarfedora-248d.vcd
files.contentPreview: #!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash pkill -9 -f termux-x11 2>/dev/null pkill -9 -f pulseaudio 2>/dev/null if command -v pulseaudio >/dev/null 2>&1; then pulseaudio --start \ --load="module-native-protocol-tcp auth-ip-acl=127.0.0.1 auth-anonymous=1" \ --exit-idle-time=-1 2>/dev/null fi export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR="$TMPDIR" rm -rf "$TMPDIR/.X11-unix" termux-x11 :0 -ac & sleep 3 am start --user 0 -n com.termux.x11/com
